# Agent_Coding Framework v3.0 - Full Documentation

> Enterprise-grade AI Multi-Agent Development Framework
> Complete reference for AI agents

---

## 1. OVERVIEW

Agent_Coding is a comprehensive framework that enables multiple AI models 
(Gemini, Claude, GPT, Grok) to work together as a coordinated Product Development team.

### Problem Solved
- Token limit causes AI to "forget" project context
- No coordination between different AI sessions
- No persistent knowledge across conversations

### Solution
- Context persistence via Markdown files
- Structured handover protocols
- Knowledge base for bugs and lessons learned
- 19 specialized agent roles

---

## 2. FRAMEWORK STRUCTURE

```
Agent_Coding/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .agent/                    # Agent System
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ORCHESTRATOR.instructions.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ BOOTSTRAP.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ EMERGENCY_RCA.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ agents/               # 19 agent definitions
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ solution_architect.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tech_lead.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ fullstack_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ backend_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ frontend_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api_developer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ database_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ web_developer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui_ux_designer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ qa_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ devops_engineer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ project_manager.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ security.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ performance.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ researcher.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ brainstormer.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ scout.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ git_manager.agent.md
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ docs_manager.agent.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ workflows/            # 10 workflows
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 01_session_start.md
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 02_context_handover.md

в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 09_cook.md
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ 10_parallel_execution.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ meta/                 # Meta-programming
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ META_SKILL.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ modes/                # Special modes
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ULTRATHINK.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ protocols/            # Protocols
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ RESEARCH_FIRST.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .shared/                   # Shared Resources
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ context/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ knowledge_base/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tech_stacks/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ui_ux_patterns/       # 57 styles, 95 palettes, 56 fonts
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docs/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ playbook_vi/          # Vietnamese Playbooks
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ HUONG_DAN_SU_DUNG.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ COMMAND_REFERENCE.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 09_META_SYSTEM.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 10_ULTRATHINK.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 11_INTERNET_SEARCH.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 12_VIBE_CODING.md
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 13_WORKFLOW_CHAINS.md
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ 14_DAILY_OPERATIONS.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CLAUDE.md                  # Claude AI instructions
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ GEMINI.md                  # Gemini AI instructions
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ COPILOT.md                 # GitHub Copilot instructions
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PROJECT_CONTEXT.md         # Current project state
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ KANBAN.md                  # Task board
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md                  # Main documentation
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ llms.txt                   # AI discovery (short)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ llms-full.txt              # AI discovery (this file)
```

---

## 3. 19 SPECIALIZED AGENTS

| Agent | Role | Expertise |
|-------|------|-----------|
| Solution Architect | System design | Architecture, tech decisions |
| Tech Lead | Code quality | Standards, reviews, mentoring |
| Fullstack Engineer | End-to-end | Full features |
| Backend Engineer | Server-side | APIs, business logic |
| Frontend Engineer | Client-side | UI, state management |
| API Developer | API design | REST, GraphQL, OpenAPI |
| Database Engineer | Data layer | Schema, optimization |
| Web Developer | Web basics | HTML, CSS, JS |
| UI/UX Designer | Design | Design systems, UX |
| QA Engineer | Testing | Quality assurance |
| DevOps Engineer | Operations | CI/CD, infrastructure |
| Project Manager | Management | Planning, tracking |
| Security | Security | Audits, vulnerabilities |
| Performance | Optimization | Caching, speed |
| Researcher | Research | Best practices, libraries |
| Brainstormer | Ideation | YAGNI, KISS, DRY |
| Scout | Navigation | File discovery |
| Git Manager | Version control | Commits, branches |
| Docs Manager | Documentation | Docs maintenance |

---

## 4. 80+ COMMANDS

### Orchestration
- `/start-session` - Initialize session
- `/handover` - Generate handover
- `/status` - Show status
- `/kanban` - Display board
- `/resume` - Resume session

### Agent Delegation
- `/assign [agent] [task]` - Assign task
- `/switch [agent]` - Switch role

### Development
- `/plan [feature]` - Create plan
- `/code [task]` - Implement
- `/test [component]` - Generate tests
- `/debug [issue]` - Debug
- `/review` - Code review

### v3.0 Cook Commands
- `/cook [feature]` - Full workflow
- `/cook:auto [feature]` - Auto implement
- `/cook:auto:fast [feature]` - Skip research

### v3.0 Fix Commands
- `/fix:hard [issue]` - Deep fix
- `/fix:logs` - Fix from logs
- `/fix:test` - Fix failing tests
- `/fix:ci [url]` - Fix CI failures

### v3.0 Meta Commands
- `/meta:skill [name]` - Create skill
- `/meta:agent [name]` - Create agent
- `/meta:plugin [name]` - Create plugin

### v3.0 UltraThink
- `/ultrathink [problem]` - Deep reasoning
- `/ultrathink:plan [feature]` - Deep planning
- `/ultrathink:review [code]` - Craftsman review

### v3.0 Research
- `/search:github [query]` - Search GitHub
- `/search:stackoverflow [query]` - Search SO
- `/search:npm [package]` - Search NPM
- `/search:docs [framework]` - Search docs

### v3.0 Chains
- `/chain feature [desc]` - Feature chain
- `/chain fix [bug]` - Fix chain
- `/chain deploy [env]` - Deploy chain

### v3.0 Quick
- `/ask [question]` - Q&A
- `/brainstorm [topic]` - Ideation
- `/scout [query]` - Find files
- `/yolo` - Execute without confirm

---

## 5. CONTEXT PERSISTENCE

### Key Files
- `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md` - Current project state
- `KANBAN.md` - Task board
- `.shared/knowledge_base/bugs/` - Bug tracking
- `.shared/knowledge_base/lessons_learned/` - Lessons

### Session Protocol
1. Start: `/start-session`
2. Work: Use agents and commands
3. End: `/handover`

---

## 6. UI/UX DATABASE

### Styles (57)
Glassmorphism, Neumorphism, Claymorphism, Aurora, Gradient Wave,
Brutalism, Minimalist, Dark Mode Pro, Neo-Minimalism, and 48 more.

### Color Palettes (95)
Organized by industry: SaaS, E-commerce, Healthcare, Fintech,
Creative, Education, and more.

### Font Pairings (56)
Modern, Elegant, Playful, Tech/Monospace, Industry-Specific.

### Chart Types (24)
Bar, Line, Area, Pie, Donut, Scatter, Bubble, Treemap, and more.

---

## 7. v3.0 NEW FEATURES

### Meta-System
Create new skills, plugins, agents dynamically.
Reference: `.agent/meta/META_SKILL.md`

### UltraThink Mode
Deep reasoning before coding.
6 phases: Question в†’ Obsess в†’ Plan в†’ Craft в†’ Iterate в†’ Simplify
Reference: `.agent/modes/ULTRATHINK.md`

### Proactive Research
Search internet before implementing.
Reference: `.agent/protocols/RESEARCH_FIRST.md`

### Workflow Chains
Automated command sequences.
Reference: `docs/playbook_vi/13_WORKFLOW_CHAINS.md`

### Vibe Coding
Natural language coding methodology.
Reference: `docs/playbook_vi/12_VIBE_CODING.md`

---

## 8. QUICK START

```
1. Copy framework to project
2. Edit PROJECT_CONTEXT.md with project info
3. Run /start-session in AI IDE
4. Use /cook [feature] to develop
5. Run /handover before closing
```

---

## 9. IDE SUPPORT

| IDE | Instructions |
|-----|--------------|
| Claude Code | CLAUDE.md |
| Gemini/Antigravity | GEMINI.md |
| VSCode + Copilot | COPILOT.md |
| Cursor | .cursorrules |
| Windsurf | .windsurf/rules.md |

---

## 10. VERSION INFO

- **Version**: 3.0
- **Last Updated**: 2026-01-04
- **Total Agents**: 19
- **Total Commands**: 80+
- **Total Workflows**: 10
- **UI Styles**: 57
- **Color Palettes**: 95
- **Font Pairings**: 56
